# Cancel a source

<p className="ia-lede">Cancel a funding source with the API; canceling the source also cancels its direct debit mandate.</p>

Cancel a funding source with the API.
Note that canceling a funding source also cancels the direct debit mandate.

:::tip Prerequisites
- You can cancel a funding source with a [project access token](/build/using-api/authentication#tokens-project), *or*
- Account members with the `canManageAccountMembership` permission can cancel funding sources with a [user access token](/build/using-api/authentication#tokens-user).
:::

## Guide {#guide}

1. Call the `cancelFundingSource` mutation.
1. Enter the ID for the funding source you'd like to cancel.
1. Add the success payload and rejections.

## Mutation {#mutation}

<a href="https://explorer.swan.io?%3D%3D&tab=api" className="explorer-badge">Open in API Explorer</a>

```graphql {2} showLineNumbers
mutation CancelSource {
  cancelFundingSource(input: { id: "$YOUR_FUNDING_SOURCE_ID" }) {
    ... on CancelFundingSourceSuccessPayload {
      __typename
      fundingSource {
        statusInfo {
          status
        }
      }
    }
    ... on ForbiddenRejection {
      __typename
      message
    }
    ... on NotFoundRejection {
      id
      message
    }
  }
}

```

## Payload {#payload}

The payload shows that the funding source is `Canceled` and can't be used anymore.
The direct debit mandate is `Canceled` automatically *after* the funding source is `Canceled`.

```json {7} showLineNumbers
{
  "data": {
    "cancelFundingSource": {
      "__typename": "CancelFundingSourceSuccessPayload",
      "fundingSource": {
        "statusInfo": {
          "status": "Canceled"
        }
      }
    }
  }
}
```
